news.title: TD Ranks #1 in Customer Satisfaction with Mobile Banking Apps in JD Power 2026 Canada Study
TD Bank Group Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
TD Launches Agentic AI to Transform Real Estate Secured Lending from End to End
TD Survey: Middle Market Dealmakers Ready to Pursue M&A, but Valuation Gaps Persist

cases.subject: Http callout failure in Production
cases.summary: Auth provider token exchange failing with 'Content-Length header already present' error. Root cause identified: explicit Content-Length header in UAPAuthPlugin Apex class conflicts with new platform behavior. Fix: remove the header and let Salesforce manage it automatically. Support provided KB article reference. Next: CSM to be notified, investigating why this wasn't in release notes.

cases.subject: Data Transform failure in PROD
cases.summary: AAM MuleSoft Data Transform in PROD failing with no detailed error message when run manually. Customer has provided screenshot and granted org access. Support manager acknowledged and assigned team. Awaiting initial investigation.

cases.subject: Deployment monitoring Request (June 5, 2026, 10pm EST - June 6 2026, 8pm EST)
cases.summary: Deployment monitoring for Case Management enhancements (LEI links, Wealth concierge, Ticketing smartforms) via Jenkins/Dataloader. No alerts observed during EMEA monitoring hours. CSM asked customer if deployment was successful and if case can be closed. Awaiting confirmation.

cases.subject: Data retention: Apply data retention
cases.summary: Request to apply 365-day data retention on 3 DLOs (Lead_BBCRM, Lead_PBCRM, Lead_WealthCRM) using CreatedDate as EventTime field. Org ID confirmed as 00DDp000000g3wu (PROD). Support proceeding with configuration.

cases.subject: Seek Assistance on How to Resolve Issue with Percent of Apex Used
cases.summary: Apex usage at 98.06%, blocking development for upcoming release. Support requires PROD system admin access for 45min to run internal script checking for code hacks/misuse. Customer agreed to grant 1-hour access with a live call. Limit increase requires PM verification and sanity checks — not an emergency change.

cases.subject: Increase Maximum size per file for SFTP Ingestion
cases.summary: Source system cannot split files and exceeds the 2GB SFTP ingestion limit in Data Cloud. Customer requested urgent limit increase. Solution has been provided by support.

cases.subject: Report component failing validation with non-descriptive error
cases.summary: Validation error on report component (BusinessAdministratorReports/BBHUB_Duplicate_accounts_Report) in cicd26pi2 sandbox. Support unable to query org directly due to access restrictions. Customer emptied recycle bin on CICD26PI2 and ESIT sandboxes. Support checking if issue persists and investigating physical delete process.

cases.subject: Seek Assistance from Salesforce Support to Fix the Vulnerabilities
cases.summary: Two vulnerabilities flagged: (1) Lucky13 — servers using CBC mode ciphers susceptible to attack; (2) Missing HttpOnly flag on cookies allowing client-side JS access. Customer requesting Salesforce assistance to remediate. Awaiting additional information.

cases.subject: Queries related to Hyperforce migration
cases.summary: TD seeking guidance on Hyperforce migration impact: community portal connections, API integrations, SF-to-SF connections with commercial org, connected apps, managed packages. Also asking about documentation listing all impacted functionalities. Awaiting Salesforce responses.

cases.subject: Please exempt mfa enablements for 3 months for our US Wealth orgs
cases.summary: Requesting 3-month MFA exemption (until October) for all US Wealth orgs across 4 enforcement areas: employee MFA, phishing-resistant admin MFA, report action step-up auth, and anomalous report export verification. Internal architects evaluating PingFed integration. Discussed with Salesforce team on 05/27 call.

cases.subject: 90-Day Deferral Request for Salesforce MFA Enforcement - REDS
cases.summary: Requesting 90-day deferral for MFA enforcement on TDS Org (00D6A000002zHJ3). Sandbox enforcement June 2026, production July 2026. Deferral needed for controlled rollout aligned with TD enterprise-wide PingFed/Windows Hello implementation. Targeting phased enablement by end of year.

cases.subject: Notification of Upcoming Production Deployment - Refer a Friend Capability (June 10)
cases.summary: Major production deployment for Refer a Friend capability scheduled June 10. Customer notifying support team in advance and requesting standby availability in case issues arise during or post-deployment.

cases.subject: Datacloud: Real-time Identity Resolution not working across domains
cases.summary: Real-time Identity Resolution failing to unify individuals across two domains (staging website vs quoter page) despite matching First Name + Last Name + Phone. Each domain creates separate individual records with different unified IDs. Batch IDR works correctly — issue is specific to real-time streaming unification across domains. Detailed technical investigation with PII matching rules provided.

cases.subject: Extension for MFA Enforcement
cases.summary: MFA extension requested for ~20,000 user org. Current SSO (Single Sign-On) does not support MFA integration. IP restrictions and RAS token-based VPN already enforced. Collaborating with internal security teams on enterprise MFA strategy. Targeting phased enablement by end of year. Solution provided by Salesforce.

cases.subject: Prod Audit - Salesforce Advisor Portal (FSC1) - Encryption of Data at Rest
cases.summary: TD requesting screenshot evidence showing encryption at rest is properly configured for Salesforce Advisor Portal (FSC1) in line with TD Data Protection guidelines. Audit compliance requirement. Awaiting information from Salesforce.

00DDp000000g3wu.action: Drive Product Adoption enablement sessions for Data Cloud features
00DDp000000g3wu.rationale: Product Adoption at 44/100 is the weakest score — significant gap vs. Customer Expertise (98). Schedule Data Cloud feature workshops focusing on segmentation, activation, and calculated insights to close the adoption gap.

00DDp000000g3wu.action: Resolve Real-time Identity Resolution cross-domain failure
00DDp000000g3wu.rationale: Identity Resolution only works in batch, not real-time across domains (staging website vs quoter page). This is a platform-level gap affecting data quality. Escalate with R&D if needed.

00DDp000000g3wu.action: Confirm data retention policy applied successfully on 3 DLOs
00DDp000000g3wu.rationale: 365-day retention requested on Lead_BBCRM, Lead_PBCRM, Lead_WealthCRM. Once confirmed, close the case and document the retention policy for audit compliance.

00DDp000000g3wu.action: Proactive deployment support for Refer a Friend go-live (June 10)
00DDp000000g3wu.rationale: Customer preemptively raised a case for deployment monitoring. Assign standby resources and confirm rollback plan to minimize production risk.

00DDp000000g3wu.action: Technical Health review — investigate root causes of 52/100 score
00DDp000000g3wu.rationale: Technical Health improved by 1 point but remains below threshold. Review platform limits, API error rates, and governor limit consumption to identify systemic issues.

00D8c000008QbQi.action: Resolve Data Transform PROD failure immediately
00D8c000008QbQi.rationale: AAM MuleSoft Data Transform failing in production with no error details — this blocks active data pipelines. Case is brand new (June 8). Push for root cause analysis and workaround within 24 hours.

00D8c000008QbQi.action: Confirm SFTP ingestion limit increase is applied and tested
00D8c000008QbQi.rationale: Solution was provided for the 2GB file size limit. Verify the increase is active in production and customer has confirmed ingestion works for their larger files. Close case once validated.

00D8c000008QbQi.action: Product Adoption enablement — focus on advanced Data Cloud capabilities
00D8c000008QbQi.rationale: Product Adoption at 51/100 is the weakest dimension (dropped 1 point). Customer Expertise is already 100 — they know the product, they just aren't using all of it. Identify unused features and create an activation plan.

00D8c000008QbQi.action: Technical Health improvement plan — target 70+ threshold
00D8c000008QbQi.rationale: Technical Health at 60 (dropped 2 points). At current trajectory, this needs attention. Review error logs, integration health, and API patterns. Score of 70+ would move overall to 'Excellent+' territory.

00D8c000008QbQi.action: Document data pipeline architecture and failure modes
00D8c000008QbQi.rationale: Two of the open cases are pipeline-related (Data Transform + SFTP limits). Create a shared architecture doc with support team to accelerate future troubleshooting and reduce MTTR.

improvements: TD US Commercial (00D300000001G8W): Technical Health critically low at 32/100. Active Sev 2 cases around Apex usage limits and security vulnerabilities. Prioritize technical debt remediation.

TD Business Banking (00Df4000004l6wQ): Overall score 55/100 is the lowest. Product Adoption at 47 and Technical Health at 39 both need focused enablement. Report validation errors actively being worked.
TD CPB (00D1I000000oXUy): Overall 58/100 with Technical Health at 43. MFA enforcement extension requested - compliance friction ongoing.

MFA Enforcement is a cross-org theme: Multiple open Sev 2 cases across US Commercial, Business Banking, US Wealth, REDS, and CPB orgs requesting MFA enforcement extensions or deferral. #1 operational concern across TD Bank.

TD Canada CDP (00DDp000000g3wu): Overall 57/100 (Good). Product Adoption lowest at 44 — needs focused enablement. Active Sev 2 cases around data retention, identity resolution failures, and upcoming production deployment.

TD US CDP (00D8c000008QbQi): Overall 64/100 (Excellent). Product Adoption at 51 is the weakest area. Data Transform failure in PROD (Sev 2) and SFTP ingestion file size limits impacting data pipeline reliability.
